meaning: n.(有机物或矿物的)稀糊,岩浆,[药]乳浆剂
examples: The volcano threw new showers of magma and ash into the air.
They are formed over a hot spot of magma.
Zircon starts off as molten magma, the hot lava from volcanoes.
This creates a huge opportunity for smart and well-financed component companies like Dana, Delphi and Magma.
Suzuki declined to elaborate on the arrangement, but said that Magma would not be a sponsor.
